//1: Root workspace package.json for drava. For a brownfield project that already
//2: has one, do NOT overwrite — merge the scripts + devDependencies + packageManager below
//3: (ownership: project, upgrade_strategy: diff-and-prompt). The gate depends on the lint /
//4: typecheck / test scripts existing per-package and on these root devDependencies.
name: drava
//scripts-note: Each package/app must define its own lint/typecheck/test scripts so turbo has tasks to run. The gate FAILS (GAN-34) if turbo runs 0 tasks for lint or typecheck. Per-package convention: lint='biome check src', typecheck='tsc --noEmit', test='vitest run --coverage'.
